name: dolifer
description: Claude Code plugins maintained by Denis Olifer. Hosts the NGql Skill across stable (`ngql`) and preview (`ngql-preview`) channels — install whichever channel matches your NGql release.

plugins.name: ngql
plugins.description: Stable Claude Code Skill for the NGql query builder. Generates NGql query-builder C# from natural language, paste, or curl. Pairs with the `dotnet-ngql` CLI to verify rendered GraphQL.

plugins.name: ngql-preview
plugins.description: Preview channel of the NGql Claude Code Skill. Tracks the latest preview release of NGql — install this if you're testing an upcoming NGql release; otherwise install `ngql` (stable). Both plugins can coexist in the same Claude Code session.
